query: ( ( "heat warning system"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat alert system"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat health action plan"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat emergency response"[Title/Abstract] OR "extreme heat intervention"[Title/Abstract] OR "weather forecast intervention"[Title/Abstract] OR "temperature forecast advisory"[Title/Abstract] OR "cooling center"[Title/Abstract] OR "cooling shelter"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat refuge"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat wave warning"[Title/Abstract] OR "heatwave alert"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat early warning"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat action plan"[Title/Abstract] OR "Heat Stress Disorders/prevention and control"[MeSH] OR "Disaster Planning"[MeSH] ) AND ( "heat-related mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-related death"[Title/Abstract] OR "temperature-mortality relationship"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat morbidity"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat hospitalization"[Title/Abstract] OR "emergency department visit"[Title/Abstract] OR "cardiovascular mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "respiratory mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "excess mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat wave"[Title/Abstract] OR "heatwave"[Title/Abstract] OR "extreme temperature"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat stroke"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat exhaustion"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-related illness"[Title/Abstract] OR "Hot Temperature"[MeSH] OR "Mortality"[MeSH] OR "Heat Stroke"[MeSH] ) AND ( "causal inference"[Title/Abstract] OR "quasi-experimental"[Title/Abstract] OR "difference-in-differences"[Title/Abstract] OR "regression discontinuity"[Title/Abstract] OR "interrupted time series"[Title/Abstract] OR "natural experiment"[Title/Abstract] OR "instrumental variable"[Title/Abstract] OR "randomized controlled trial"[Title/Abstract] OR randomized[Title/Abstract] OR randomised[Title/Abstract] OR "counterfactual"[Title/Abstract] OR "propensity score"[Title/Abstract] OR "synthetic control"[Title/Abstract] OR "program evaluation"[Title/Abstract] OR "impact evaluation"[Title/Abstract] OR "Randomized Controlled Trial"[Publication Type] OR "Interrupted Time Series Analysis"[MeSH] ) )
